arts.ttl: Getafe 0-1 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Arda Guler proves his point in vital Los Blancos win
arts.sum: Arda Guler scores the only goal of the match as Real Madrid record a 1-0 victory over Getafe in Wednesday night's La Liga clash at Estadio Coliseum.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star limps out of Getafe clash with injury days before Barcelona showdown
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Wednesday been dealt a concerning blow on the personnel front. This comes after Eduardo Camavinga was forced into a late departure from the…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid keep pace with Barcelona in La Liga with victory over Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have kept themselves in the La Liga title race after picking up an important 1-0 victory over Getafe at the Coliseum. Carlo Ancelotti opted to make several changes to his side ahead of this weekend’s Copa del Rey final against Barcelona. arts.ttl: WATCH: Arda Guler scores as Real Madrid lead against Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona’s victory over Mallorca on Tuesday means that the pressure is on Real Madrid to respond against Getafe, and they are doing so after taking the lead in their La Liga match at the Coliseum.
